$description: Golden fixtures mapping sample ID to expected completions. Used for exact-match and fuzzy-match comparison in eval metrics.
$note: These completions represent what a GOOD DeepSeek FIM completion (temperature 0.2, split-only template) should produce. The primary value is the canonical expected output; alternatives are also acceptable.

syn-empty-file.rationale: Empty file with no context — model should produce empty or minimal placeholder.

syn-line-continuation.rationale: Arithmetic expression continuation at end of 'const result = 1 + 2'.

syn-block-start.rationale: Function body completion for 'function add(a, b) {' — the natural body is a return statement.

syn-import.rationale: Named import completion after 'import { ' — expect identifier(s) and from clause.

syn-comment-to-code.rationale: Code generated from the comment '// sort the array' — any sort call is reasonable.

syn-argument-completion.rationale: Argument completion for 'function foo(x, y) {} foo(' — pass the declared parameters.

syn-test-completion.rationale: Jest/Vitest test body inside describe→it block — expect/assert pattern.

syn-return-statement.rationale: Return statement completion for 'function getValue() {' — return with closing brace.
